75669.subject: Robinhood Chain Leans Into Memecoins in Week One
75669.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

These were the biggest news in web3 today:

* **[Robinhood Chain](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/robinhood-chain-metrics-surge-as-the-network-leans-into-memecoins)**['s metrics surge on a memecoin frenzy as Tenev calls it 'great for memes'](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/robinhood-chain-metrics-surge-as-the-network-leans-into-memecoins)

* **[Paradigm](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/paradigm-raises-1-2-billion-for-fourth-venture-fund)**[ raises $1.2B for its fourth fund, widening beyond pure crypto](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/paradigm-raises-1-2-billion-for-fourth-venture-fund)

* **[Dinari and tZERO](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/dinari-tzero-partner-on-tokenized-us-stock-framework)**[ partner on a framework to bring tokenized US stocks to broker-dealers](https://thedefiant.io/news/tradfi-and-fintech/dinari-tzero-partner-on-tokenized-us-stock-framework)

* **[Strike](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/strike-launches-bitcoin-loans-with-no-price-liquidations)**[ launches bitcoin loans with no price-triggered liquidations](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/strike-launches-bitcoin-loans-with-no-price-liquidations)

* **[The SEC](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/sec-adds-three-crypto-rules-to-2026-regulatory-agenda)**[ puts three crypto rulemakings on its 2026 agenda, some as soon as July](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/sec-adds-three-crypto-rules-to-2026-regulatory-agenda)

* **[Inside DTCC's Move to Stellar](https://thedefiant.io/education/explainers/dtcc-stellar-tokenization-dtc-custodied-assets-explainer)**[ (Partner)](https://thedefiant.io/education/explainers/dtcc-stellar-tokenization-dtc-custodied-assets-explainer)

Robinhood launched its own chain last week as serious infrastructure for tokenized stocks. A week in, the thing driving activity is memecoins.

**Robinhood Chain**'s onchain metrics [surged this week](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/robinhood-chain-metrics-surge-as-the-network-leans-into-memecoins) as **Pump.fun** added trading for its tokens, prediction market **World** said it will migrate from Solana, and a **CASHCAT** meme frenzy took off — with CEO **Vlad Tenev** reversing course to call the RWA-focused chain "great for memes." The largest single inflow, though, was a quiet stablecoin deposit.

The gap between the pitch and the early traction is the story. Robinhood sold [Robinhood Chain](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/robinhood-launches-robinhood-chain-mainnet-adds-stock-tokens-onchain-lending-and-agentic-crypto) as the compliant home for tokenized equities, but the fastest on-ramp to a new chain is still speculation. Whether Tenev leans in or steers back toward the RWA thesis will decide what the network is actually for.

**Read more below!**

———————————————————————————

##### PARTNER

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/86

75666.body:
Forbes P.M.

Автор: Forbes


Автор: Forbes

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/trumps-foreign-licensing-business-grew-900-he-returned-wnegc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3Bxm3g83ghRBeET7vyCckLCQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2qJY7h1_N6Bck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrcl0vcw~w6-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrcl0vcw-w6
  
Good evening, Trump’s international licensing business resurrected from a slump and generated $61 million in 2025, according to a financial disclosure report released last week. The president once acknowledged concerns with foreign deals, but he reversed course upon returning to the White House. “There are no conflicts of interest," White House deputy press secretary Anna Kelly said in a statement. Here’s what to know about Trump’s international dealings. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads Getty Images More Than 100 Billionaires Have Backed This Moderate Maine Republican As the Democratic nominee faces pressure to withdraw from the Maine U.S. Senate race, these billionaires see an opportunity to keep a Republican moderate in power. Bloomberg Finance LP California Will Give You $3,500 To Buy A New EV Electric vehicle sales have plunged in the U.S. since the Trump administration eliminated a $7,500 federal rebate last year. California hopes to rectify that.
